text: [Injured] Foot injury Sustained a foot injury in the game against Manchester United on 25/1. Subsequent assessment has revealed he has a bone injury. Will have surgery and be out of action "for an extended period". Remains out as of 8/5. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Suffered an ankle injury in the match against Everton on 14/3 and has been sidelined since. Doing "some stuff on the pitch" as of 28/4 but remains out as of 8/5. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a serious knee injury in the FA Cup tie against Spurs on 10/1. Will miss the rest of the season. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Knock Missed the Fulham game on 25/4 because of some "small pain". Returned for the Europa League tie against Nottingham Forest on 30/4 but was injured during the match. Ruled out of the Spurs game on 3/5 and faces a scan. Still sidelined as of 6/5. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Lack of match fitness Has been out for two months with a hamstring injury but is back in partial training as of 8/5. Probably won't be involved against Fulham on 9/5 but should return thereafter. [Source]
[Unavailable] Made unavailable for selection on 8/5. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Lack of match fitness Has been out since January with a knee injury. Back in training in late April. Should be involved in the squad to face Fulham on 9/5. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury It was reported on 20/11 that he had sustained an anterior cruciate ligament injury and would be out for the rest of the season. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off in the match against Bournemouth on 3/3 with a hamstring strain. His manager expects him to be out for "numerous weeks". Back on the grass but still sidelined as of 8/5. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His club reported on 15/10 that he had suffered an ACL injury and had undergone season-ending surgery. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the match against Tottenham Hotspur on 18/4. Has been sidelined since. Had been aiming to return against Wolverhampton Wanderers on 9/5 but his manager said the club won't take any risks with his fitness. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the match against Aston Villa on 3/12. He will be out for the season after ACL damage was detected. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury His manager confirmed on 26/7 that he will undergo surgery on a knee ligament injury. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Ankle injury Substituted in the match against Newcastle on 2/5 with a recurrence of his ankle injury. His manager said on 8/5 that it would be "tight" as to whether he'd recover for the Wolves match on 9/5. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Returned from a long-term knee injury in pre-season but had a small setback with a hamstring injury and has been sidelined since. His manager reported another setback on 16/10. On the grass as of 23/12 but his club are taking their time with him. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Picked up a serious knee injury in the match against Everton on 27/12. Ruled out for nine months. [Source]

[Injured] Achilles injury Missed the start of the season. Had been training and aiming for a return to action after the October international break but he has had a setback and will be out for “a few months”. His manager said on 8/5 that he will play for the U21s this week. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Suffered a hamstring injury in the match against Manchester United on 18/4. Ruled out for the season on 24/4. [Source]
[Injured] Head injury Stretchered off with a head injury in the match against Nottingham Forest on 4/5. Ruled out for the season on 7/5. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Knock Missed the Nottingham Forest game on 4/5 with a knock. Unlikely to recover for the Liverpool game on 9/5. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Hamstring injury Came off early in the match against West Ham on 31/1 with a hamstring injury. His manager said on 5/2 that it looked like a “long-term” issue. Had been on the cusp of a return against Newcastle on 14/3 but felt his hamstring again before the game and couldn't feature. Was on the verge of another comeback but suffered yet another hamstring issue on the eve of the FA Cup tie against Port Vale on 4/4. [Source]
[Suspended] Provisionally suspended by the Football Association after failing a drugs test. [Source]
[Doubt 25%] Knock Missed the Nottingham Forest game on 4/5 with a knock. Unlikely to recover for the Liverpool game on 9/5. [Source]
[Injured] Head injury Taken off with a head injury in the match against Nottingham Forest on 4/5. Ruled out of the Liverpool game on 9/5. [Source]

[Injured] Lack of match fitness Has been out for over a year with a knee injury but has returned to training. Has featured three times for the under-21s to boost his match fitness. His manager said on 8/4 that he has had a "few disrupted weeks" due to muscle discomfort but that he should be back in training by the end of the week. Palace will continue to be cautious with him and he remains sidelined as of 6/5. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Knee injury Suffered a knee injury in the match against Fiorentina on 9/4. His manager ruled him out for at least 3-4 weeks on 12/4. Back in partial training ahead of the match against Shakhtar Donetsk on 7/5 but won't feature. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the Fulham game on 1/1 with a hamstring injury and has been sidelined since. Was on the cusp of a return in April but reinjured himself in training on 8/4. His season is now over. [Source]
[Doubt 50%] Knock Missed the Bournemouth game on 3/5 with a minor injury. Won't return against Shakhtar on 7/5. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Liverpool on 19/4. His club reported on 22/4 that he'd likely be out for the season. [Source]
[Injured] Foot injury Confirmed on 20/1 that he had suffered a stress fracture in his foot. May be out for the season. Out of his protective boot and doing more training as of 8/5. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Knock Missed the Man City game on 4/5 with a "slight" injury picked up in training. His manager said he was "fine" as of 8/5 and hopes he'll be back soon but added that he was yet to train. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Taken off with a hamstring injury in the match against Brentford on 18/4. Has been sidelined since and is still out as of 8/5. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Came off in the Aston Villa game on 25/4 after "feeling something". Will be out for at least the next two matches. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Ruled out for the season with a meniscus injury on 23/4. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Was struggling in the closing stages of the FA Cup semi-final against Chelsea on 26/4. His manager later revealed he had suffered a hamstring injury. Will miss the Burnley game on 1/5 and the Spurs match on 11/5. Still hopes to feature in the final 1-2 fixtures of the season. [Source]
[Injured] Calf injury Has suffered a calf injury and will miss the matches against Spurs on 11/5 and Brighton on 17/5. Still hopes to return on the final day. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Hip injury Struggling with a hip contusion and training individually on 8/5 but hopes to be fit for the Spurs game on 11/5. [Source]
[Injured] Hamstring injury Missed the whole of pre-season and the start of 2025/26 with a hamstring injury. Reports on 7/1 suggest another setback. Still out as of 13/3. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Arsenal on 8/1. His club described it as a "significant" injury on 11/1 and he will have to undergo surgery. Ruled out for the season. [Source]

[Injured] Hamstring injury Has been sidelined since September with a hamstring injury. Back in training in the week beginning 2/3 but suffered another hamstring issue on his comeback game for the under-21s on 16/3. Remains some distance from the first team as of 17/4. [Source]

[Injured] Achilles injury Stretchered off with a ruptured Achilles tendon in the match against PSG on 14/4. His club confirmed on 16/4 that it was a season-ending injury and that he would also miss the World Cup. [Source]

[Injured] Foot injury Stretchered off with a foot injury in the match against Sunderland on 11/2. His manager thinks it is a "serious one" and confirmed he would be out for "a while". Still aiming to return towards the end of the season as of 24/4 and is back on the pitch but won't feature in the next three league matches at least. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Groin Injury Missed the Man Utd game on 3/5 with a minor groin injury. Back in partial training as of 7/5. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Stretchered off with a serious knee injury in the match against Southampton on 23/9. Has torn his ACL and will be out for a year. [Source]
[Doubt 50%] Knee injury Taken off with a "big wound" in the match against Everton on 19/4. Rejoined training on 8/5. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Missed the Brighton game on 21/3 with a muscle injury. Has been sidelined since. His manager said on 3/4 that he will return "towards the end of the season". Has yet to rejoin training as of 8/5. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Taken off with what appeared to be a hamstring injury in the match against Crystal Palace on 25/4. A scan has determined that it is a minor issue and he should return before the end of the season. Has yet to rejoin training as of 8/5. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Lack of match fitness Has been sidelined since mid-March with a muscle issue but back in training ahead of the Brentford match on 9/5. [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Lack of match fitness Has been sidelined since January with a leg injury but back in training ahead of the Brentford match on 9/5. His manager hopes he can “help us in the last part of the season”. [Source]

[Doubt 75%] Groin Injury Came off with a groin injury in the match against Arsenal on 19/4 and has been sidelined since. His manager hopes he'll be back for the Brentford game on 4/5 but added that he was not feeling “completely comfortable”. [Source]

[Injured] Back injury Missed the West Ham game on 4/12 with a niggling back injury. Has been unavailable since as the recovery is taking much longer than anticipated. Back doing individual work on the grass but remains out as of 1/5. [Source]
[Doubt 75%] Shin injury Taken off with a shin injury in the match against Liverpool on 3/5. No update provided in the pre-match presser on 7/5. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Picked up a knee injury on international duty with Sweden and missed the Manchester City match on 22/11 as a result. Has been absent since. Is “further back” in his recovery compared to other Newcastle defenders as of 2/1. [Source]

[Injured] Thigh injury Was forced off with a thigh issue in the Bournemouth game on 18/4. Has been sidelined since and his manager said on 8/5 that he'd likely be out for the rest of the season. [Source]
[Injured] Leg injury Suffered a fractured fibula in training on 5/5 and will miss the rest of the season. [Source]

[Injured] Ankle injury Taken off with a significant ankle injury in the match against Leeds on 7/1. Subsequently underwent surgery. He had hoped to return after the March international break but an infection has delayed that. His manager said on 8/5 that he was not sure whether he'd feature again this season. [Source]
[Doubt 50%] Head injury Substituted after a collision of heads in the match against Chelsea on 4/5. Expected to be fit for the Europa League tie against Aston Villa on 7/5. [Source]
[Doubt 50%] Knock Limped off during the Europa League tie against Aston Villa on 30/4 and has been sidelined since. Uncertain whether he'll be back for the rematch with Villa on 7/5. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury It was revealed on 10/2 that he hadn't been named in the 25-man Premier League squad because he was recovering from a knee injury. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Facial Injury Taken off in the match against Chelsea on 4/5 after a clash of heads. His manager says it is not a concussion but instead more of a facial injury. Could be available against Aston Villa on 7/5 but a late call is needed. [Source]
[Injured] Muscle injury Taken off with a quad injury in the match against Porto on 16/4. His club confirmed on 21/4 that he'd be out for the season. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Injured in the process of conceding Nottm Forest's third goal in their defeat to Aston Villa on 3/1. Has been sidelined since. His manager said on 9/1 that he'd had some blood drained from his knee but the injury hasn't settled as quickly as hoped. Has since undergone surgery and is expected to miss the rest of the season. [Source]
[Doubt 50%] Knock Missed the Europa League tie against Aston Villa on 30/4 and has been sidelined since. Uncertain whether he'll be back for the rematch with Villa on 7/5. [Source]
[Doubt 50%] Knock Taken off with a minor injury in the match against Sunderland on 24/4 and has been sidelined since. Uncertain whether he'll be back for the match with Aston Villa on 7/5. [Source]

[Doubt 50%] Muscle injury Taken off in the match against Burnley on 19/4. Has been sidelined since. Not ready to return as of 29/4 but his manager said he "maybe" could return in "a few days". Uncertain whether he'll be back for the match with Aston Villa on 7/5. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Missed the Europa League match against Ferencvaros on 29/1 with a knee injury. Has been sidelined since and tests are ongoing as of 25/2 to determine how long he'll be out. [Source]
[Suspended] 3 Match Ban Suspended for three matches after being sent off for violent conduct in the match against Wolverhampton Wanderers on 2/5.

[Injured] Hamstring injury Picked up a hamstring injury in the match against Fulham on 22/2. Ruled out for around eight weeks initially but has undergone surgery and his manager thinks his season may be over. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Stretchered off with a serious-looking injury in the match against West Ham on 17/1. It was revealed on 19/1 that he has undergone surgery on a fractured ankle [Source]

[Injured] Thigh injury Suffered a serious quad injury in the match against Sunderland on 4/1. Had been aiming to return after the March international break but has suffered a setback and may need surgery. [Source]

[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knock in the match against Crystal Palace on 11/5. It later transpired that he had sustained a knee injury and would need season-ending surgery. Missed the start of 2025/26 and is still out as of 4/12. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off in the match against Newcastle on 10/2. The club later revealed he had suffered a ruptured ACL and will need surgery. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Taken off with a knee injury in the match against Sunderland on 12/4. Will miss the rest of the season. [Source]
[Injured] Knee injury Stretchered off with a knee injury in the match against Wolves on 25/4. Ruled out for the season with a ruptured ACL on 27/4. [Source]

[Doubt 25%] Muscle injury Taken off with what appeared to be a hamstring injury in the match against Wolves on 24/4. Has been sidelined since but is "improving" as of 7/5. His manager doesn't know if he'll be fit for Leeds on 11/5 and instead discussed Chelsea on 17/5 as a likelier return date. [Source]
[Injured] Hernia His club confirmed on 20/3 that he will undergo surgery on a hernia. Still unavailable as of 7/5 with no return date in sight. [Source]
[Injured] Shoulder injury Missed the match against Brentford on 16/3 with a shoulder injury and has been sidelined since. His manager said on 8/5 that he is out for the season. [Source]
[Injured] Ankle injury Ruled out of the Brighton game on 9/5 with an ankle issue, but his manager is hopeful he will return next week. [Source]
